name: 4p16_3_Wolf_Hirschhorn_subtelomeric
description: Wolf-Hirschhorn syndrome (WHS) 4p16.3 terminal deletion — variable-size (1.5-25 Mb) deletions of distal 4p. Critical genes WHSC1 (NSD2), WHSC2, LETM1 (epilepsy), FGFRL1 (growth/craniofacial). Complements existing chr4_4p16_3_LETM1_WHSC1_cluster and chr4_4p16_3_WHS_breakpoints files with explicit ClinGen consensus and reciprocal duplication context.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD cluster (~20-100 kb blocks) shared with other subtelomeric regions; critical dosage-sensitive genes WHSC1/NSD2 (primary), WHSC2/NELFA, LETM1 (epilepsy), FGFRL1, CTBP1, MAEA, MSANTD1. WHS critical region (WHSCR) and WHSCR-2 define minimum deletions.
